tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated fasting glucose, cholesterol, LDL, and triglycerides, with low HDL, indicating dyslipidemia and impaired glucose regulation, suggestive of metabolic syndrome and increased cardiovascular risk. Renal and electrolyte parameters are within normal limits, and there is no evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend clinical correlation, lifestyle modification, and further evaluation for diabetes and cardiovascular risk management.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
